name: Vﺣ۴xnﺣ۳s
description: I stadsdelen Vﺣ۴xnﺣ۳s (centralt i Karlstad) finns dessa klippor. En handfull olika vﺣ۳ggar pﺣ۴ ca 3 meters hﺣﭘjd. Sol under hela dagen ger lﺣ۴ng sﺣ۳song och nﺣ۴got enstaka problem kanske kan fﺣﭘrsvara ett besﺣﭘk.

sections.title: Allmﺣ۳nt
sections.body: I stadsdelen Vﺣ۴xnﺣ۳s (centralt i Karlstad) finns dessa klippor. En handfull olika vﺣ۳ggar pﺣ۴ ca 3 meters hﺣﭘjd. Sol under hela dagen ger lﺣ۴ng sﺣ۳song och nﺣ۴got enstaka problem kanske kan fﺣﭘrsvara ett besﺣﭘk.

sections.title: Vﺣ۳gbeskrivning
sections.body: Kﺣﭘr mot stadsdelen Vﺣ۴xnﺣ۳s, fﺣﭘlj vﺣ۳gen Karmgatan mot Vﺣ۴xnﺣ۳shallen och en fotbollsplan. Fﺣﭘlj Karmgatan vﺣ۳nster nﺣ۳r du ser hallen och fotbollsplanen rakt fram. Fﺣﭘlj Karmgatan fﺣﭘrbi avfarten till Hemvﺣ۳gen tills vﺣ۳gen ﺣﭘvergﺣ۴r i en bussfil (bussfilen fortsﺣ۳tter fﺣﭘrbi Vﺣ۴rdcentralen Vﺣ۳sterstrand). Parkera i vﺣ۳ndplanen, dﺣ۳r det stﺣ۴r bilar (gratis) och titta ﺣ۴t hﺣﭘger/upp mot skogen sﺣ۴ borde du se klipporna. 100 meter frﺣ۴n parkering.

sections.title: Sektioner
sections.body:
Sektionerna ﺣ۳r upprﺣ۳knade frﺣ۴n vﺣ۳nster till hﺣﭘger.

Graderna endast uppskattade av klﺣ۳ttrare utan erfarenhet av bouldergrader och dess disciplin. Var god ﺣ۳ndra direkt pﺣ۴ sidan om de kﺣ۳nns felaktiga.

sections.title: HIV-vﺣ۳ggen
sections.body:
Klippartiet hﺣﭘgst upp till vﺣ۳nster. Bﺣﭘrjar med en tyngre ﺣﭘverhﺣ۳ngande parti. Mer befriad frﺣ۴n grepp ﺣ۳n ﺣﭘvriga partier vilket gﺣﭘr den till Vﺣ۴xnﺣ۳s testpiece. Allteftersom vﺣ۳ggen sluttar nedﺣ۴t hﺣﭘger, blir problemen lﺣ۳ttare.

Sektionen uppkallad efter allt skrﺣ۳p som tyvﺣ۳rr finns i direkt anslutning till vﺣ۳ggen. Krossade glasflaskor, kondomer och vem vet... kanske en kanyl gﺣﭘmmer sig i grﺣ۳set? Glﺣﭘm inte paddan fﺣﭘr att undvika... sjukdomar och annat. Ett annat alternativ ﺣ۳r vinterbesﺣﭘk, sﺣ۴ snﺣﭘn isolerar och skyddar. Vﺣ۳ggen ﺣ۳r vid en slﺣ۳nt. Om du inte vill trilla ner och rulla nedfﺣﭘr slﺣ۳nten rekommenderas en spotter.

sections.title: U2-vﺣ۳ggen
sections.body:
Namnet U2 stﺣ۴r/stod skrivet pﺣ۴ vﺣ۳ggen. Dﺣ۳rav namnet pﺣ۴ denna sektion. En plattvﺣ۳gg i vinkel. Nﺣ۴gra problem gjorda, men nﺣ۴got ytterligare kanske mﺣﭘjligt. Namnen pﺣ۴ problemen fﺣﭘljer samma tema som sektionen.

Problemen upprﺣ۳knade frﺣ۴n hﺣﭘger till vﺣ۳nster.

sections.title: Vinkel-vﺣ۳ggen
sections.body:
En vﺣ۳gg likt de andra i 90 graders vinkel. Placerad ganska lﺣ۴ngt till hﺣﭘger. Till skillnad mot andra vﺣ۳ggar i vinkel sﺣ۴ har denna en stenplatta i botten.

Lederna rﺣ۳knas upp frﺣ۴n hﺣﭘger till vﺣ۳nster.

routes.name: Arslet I Dﺣ۴ligt Skick
routes.description: 4-fingercrimp fﺣﭘr vﺣ۳nster hand som nﺣ۳tt och jﺣ۳mt svﺣ۳ljer fingertopparna. Grov rensning resulterade i riktigt bra crimp fﺣﭘr hﺣﭘger hand. Etablera fﺣﭘtter och dra sedan direkt till kanten. Hoppstart givetvis uteslutet.

routes.name: Pulkrunkaren
routes.description: Mellan aids och herpes. vﺣ۳nster hand pﺣ۴ bra crimp, hﺣﭘger hand fﺣﭘrslagsvis i undercling. upp till sidogrepp under kant eller launcha hela vﺣ۳gen upp. Gﺣ۴r du ut hﺣﭘger till snﺣ۳lla kanten ﺣ۳r du svag och feg.

routes.name: Jag vﺣ۳ljer Herpes
routes.description: Samma start som pulkrunkaren, men du ﺣ۳r svag och flyr ut till hﺣﭘger och snﺣ۳lla utsteget.

routes.name: Herpes
routes.description: Nﺣ۴got fﺣﭘr alla (vilket namnet syftar pﺣ۴). Upp via stora tydliga hyllor och flak mitt pﺣ۴ HIV-vﺣ۳ggen.

routes.name: projekt
routes.description: Travers. Bﺣﭘrja dﺣ۳r led 2 bﺣﭘrjar. Gﺣ۴ via enkla grepp snett uppﺣ۴t hﺣﭘger till den slopade kanten ovanfﺣﭘr slﺣ۳ta vﺣ۳ggen. Se upp sﺣ۴ du inte lﺣ۳gger handen i glas pﺣ۴ kanten. Fortsﺣ۳tt genom "tomtar i trumpeten" och avsluta pﺣ۴ lﺣﭘsa blocket dﺣ۳r denna bﺣﭘrjar. Namnfﺣﭘrslag: Hepatit C

routes.name: Tomtar i trumpeten
routes.description: Bﺣﭘrja med match pﺣ۴ stora lﺣﭘsa blocket, fﺣﭘlj sedan stora sprickan snett upp ﺣ۴t vﺣ۳nster. Bjuder mer motstﺣ۴nd ﺣ۳n det ser ut.

routes.name: Beautiful Day
routes.description: Bﺣﭘrjar pﺣ۴ areten, leta dig ﺣ۴t hﺣﭘger och etablera dig pﺣ۴ vettiga crimpar innan du skickar till bra grepp rakt upp. Gﺣ۴r du upp via stora greppet kl 10-11 nallar du pﺣ۴ annat problem. Aja baja.

routes.name: Sweetest thing
routes.description: Bﺣﭘrja pﺣ۴ areten och fﺣﭘlj den sedan rakt upp

routes.name: Elevation
routes.description: Bﺣﭘrjar pﺣ۴ platta vﺣ۳ggen till vﺣ۳nster om areten, fina startgrepp, sedan "lﺣ۴ngt" one-move-wonder till tydliga hyllan strax under toppen och upp.

routes.name: Bad
routes.description: Upp via tydliga grepp "i hﺣﭘrnet" till vﺣ۳nster om Elevation

routes.name: I still haven't found what I'm looking for
ﺣ۴h, strﺣ۳ﺣ۳ﺣ۳ﺣ۳ﺣ۳ﺣ۳ﺣ۳ﺣ۳ck.
routes.description: Sittstart och hﺣ۳nder pﺣ۴ tvﺣ۴ ok lister, strﺣ۳ck dig upp till en liten horisontalspricka. Etablera dig och skicka till kanten.

routes.name: Kung Alkinoos
routes.description: Bﺣﭘrja pﺣ۴ areten och leta dig upp ﺣ۴t hﺣﭘger. Dra sedan rakt upp. (Kung Alkinoos var drottning Aretes make)

routes.name: Faiakernas drottning
routes.description: Rakt upp pﺣ۴ areten (Faiakernas drottning hette Arete).

description.text: In the Vﺣ۴xnﺣ۳s area (central Karlstad), you'll find these boulders. A handful of different walls around 3 metres high. Sun all day provides a long season, and a few individual problems might just warrant a visit.

body.text: In the Vﺣ۴xnﺣ۳s district (central Karlstad), youﻗll find these crags. A handful of various walls around 3 metres high. All-day sun provides a long season, and a few scattered problems might justify a visit.

Drive towards the Vﺣ۴xnﺣ۳s district, following Karmgatan towards Vﺣ۴xnﺣ۳shallen and a football pitch. Turn left on Karmgatan when you see the hall and the pitch straight ahead. Continue past the turn-off for Hemvﺣ۳gen until the road turns into a bus lane (the bus lane continues past Vﺣ۴rdcentralen Vﺣ۳sterstrand). Park in the turning area where cars are (free), and look to your right/up towards the forest; you should see the crags. 100 metres from the parking.

The sections are listed from left to right.

The grades are only estimates by climbers inexperienced with boulder grades and this discipline. Please feel free to correct them directly on the page if they seem inaccurate.

The crag at the top left. Starts with a more challenging overhanging section. More devoid of holds than the other sections, making it the testpiece of Vﺣ۴xnﺣ۳s. As the wall slopes down to the right, the problems become easier.

The section is named after the litter unfortunately found in direct proximity to the wall. Broken glass bottles, condoms, and who knows... maybe a syringe is hidden in the grass? Donﻗt forget the mat to avoid... diseases and such. An alternative is a winter visit, as the snow insulates and protects. The wall is located at a slope. If you don't want to fall and roll down the slope, a spotter is recommended.

The name U2 is/was written on the wall. Hence the name of this section. A flat wall at an angle. A few problems completed, but something further might be possible. The names of the problems follow the same theme as the section.

The problems are listed from right to left.

A wall like the others at a 90-degree angle. Located quite far to the right. Unlike other angled walls, this one has a stone slab at the bottom.

The routes are listed from right to left.

description.text: 4-finger crimp for the left hand that barely holds the fingertips. Rough cleaning has resulted in a really good crimp for the right hand. Establish feet and then reach directly for the edge. No jumping start, of course.

Between aids and herpes. Left hand on a good crimp, right hand preferably in an undercling. Move up to a sidehold under the edge or launch all the way up. If you go out right to the friendly edge, you're weak and cowardly.
Same start as Pulkrunkaren, but you're weak and flee out to the right and the friendly exit.
Something for everyone (which is what the name implies). Up via large, clear ledges and slabs in the middle of the HIV wall.

Traverse. Start where route 2 begins. Move diagonally up right using easy holds to the sloping edge above the smooth wall. Watch out for glass on the edge. Continue through "Tomtar i trumpeten" and finish on the loose block where this begins. Name suggestion: Hepatitis C
Start with a match on the large loose block, then follow the big crack diagonally up left. Offers more resistance than it looks.
Starts on the arete, move right and establish on decent crimps before sending to good holds straight up. If you go up via the large hold at 10-11, you might touch another problem. Aja baja.
Start on the arete and follow it straight up.
Starts on the flat wall to the left of the arete, good starting holds, then a "long" one-move wonder to the clear ledge just below the top and up.
Up via clear holds "in the corner" to the left of Elevation.
Over the cross ledges to the left of "Bad".
Sit start with hands on two ok edges, reach up to a small horizontal crack. Establish yourself and send to the edge.
Start on the arete and work your way up to the right. Then pull straight up. (Kung Alkinoos was Queen Arete's husband)
Straight up on the arete (Faiakernas drottning was named Arete).
